title: Oil prices touch $100 again as Iran ramps up shipping attacks in the Persian Gulf
summary_full: Strategists said oil prices were trading higher because there appears to be no end in sight to oil supply disruptions through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Strategists said oil prices were trading higher because there appears to be no end in sight to oil supply disruptions through the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran ramps up shipping attacks in the Persian Gulf
